  3. City Centre West

District

City Centre West

City Centre West is where Karlsruhe's fan begins. From Karlsruhe Palace, the city's 32 radiating streets fan out to the south. This is home to the market square, the Pyramid, St Stephen's Church, the Staatliche Kunsthalle art museum and the Botanical Garden.

BaroqueFan layoutPalace
City Centre West

Attractions in City Centre West

Landmark
Free

City Centre West

Karlsruhe Palace

Baroque residential palace of the Margraves of Baden. The geometric heart of the fan-shaped city and Karlsruhe's defining landmark.

Free entry
Park
Free

City Centre West

Palace Gardens

English landscape park behind the palace with a botanical garden and tree stands more than a hundred years old.

Free entry
Museum

City Centre West

State Art Gallery Karlsruhe

One of the oldest and most important picture galleries in Germany. Cranach, Grünewald, Rembrandt and Caspar David Friedrich.

from 8 EUR
Market Square
Free

City Centre West

Market Square with the Pyramid

A reddish sandstone pyramid serving as the tomb of city founder Karl Wilhelm. The neoclassical heart of the city.

Free entry
Church
Free

City Centre West

St Stephen's Church

A neoclassical rotunda by Friedrich Weinbrenner, modelled on the Pantheon in Rome.

Free entry
Church
Free

City Centre West

Protestant City Church

Friedrich Weinbrenner's neoclassical main church on the Market Square, with a columned portico in the classical tradition.

Free entry
Park
Free

City Centre West

Botanical Garden Karlsruhe

A historic botanical garden next to the palace, with a complex of glasshouses and tropical plants.

Free entry
Landmark
Free

City Centre West

Federal Constitutional Court

Guardian of the German constitution. A striking modernist building on Schlossplatz, freely accessible from the outside.

Free entry

Hotels in City Centre West

Guest favorite ****

City Centre West

Hotel Santo Karlsruhe

Design hotel with minimalist architecture and richly coloured interiors. Close to the convention centre.

from

Premier Inn Karlsruhe City

Schlosshotel Karlsruhe

Restaurants in City Centre West

Oberlaender Weinstube
Baden cuisine
€€€

City Centre West

Oberlaender Weinstube

Karlsruhe's legendary top address for Baden cuisine since 1824. Classic regional cooking at the highest level.
Badisch Brauhaus
Baden cuisine
€€

City Centre West

Badisch Brauhaus

Brewpub with its own brewery in the heart of Karlsruhe. Baden classics and house-brewed beer.
Vogelbraeu
Baden cuisine
€€

City Centre West

Vogelbraeu

Brewpub on Kapellenstrasse with its own beer and solid Baden-German cooking.
Sein
Modern
€€€€

City Centre West

Sein

Karlsruhe's first Michelin-starred restaurant. Modern, creative cuisine, tasting menus and clean architecture.
Erasmus
Bistro
€€€

City Centre West

Erasmus

A bistro-style star in a relaxed setting. Seasonal Mediterranean cuisine at an elevated level.
Pizzeria Lo Stivale
Italian
€€

City Centre West

Pizzeria Lo Stivale

A cult pizzeria in Karlsruhe's west end with crispy pizza and a trattoria atmosphere.
Hanami
Japanese
€€

City Centre West

Hanami

A lively sushi restaurant with a conveyor belt and a large menu. Popular for lunch and with families.
Thai-Express
Thai
€

City Centre West

Thai-Express

Authentic Thai street food in the middle of the city centre. Fast, good and affordable.
